creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to William Grzybowski from comment #3)
> I don't like the idea of patches named patch-[ab]. They are non-descriptive.
> Any chance you can describe the file being changed or group all of them in
> the same functionality patch?
> 
> This is a personal choice and it may not be documented anywhere, so if you
> don't want to do it thats acceptable.


I would be surprised if it's not documented anywhere.  By now these old patch names have to be nearing extinction so I'm not sure it's acceptable to introduce new ones actually.

Saito, just rename the patch-[ab] patches with an updated patch and the PR can get moving again.
